creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:40:50 2014
New Revision: 353387
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353387
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353387/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189276
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/misc/p5-Geo-Cache/Makefile

Modified: head/misc/p5-Geo-Cache/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/misc/p5-Geo-Cache/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:40:46 2014	(r353386)
+++ head/misc/p5-Geo-Cache/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:40:50 2014	(r353387)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	misc perl5 geography
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Object interface for GPS waypoints
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Time-modules>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Time-modules \
 		p5-XML-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Simple
 BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
